What you drawing?

Things, stuff I see.

LAWRENCE *
Like what?
TYRELL
Guys getting killed. TV shows, ya know,
people.
LAWRENCE (CONT'D) *
That's funny. I've been drawing what I
see too^ Ain't a whole lot to see in
here, but what there is, I draw.
TYRELL
I'm not too good at drawing animals.
LAWRENCE *
Go to a zoo, study the monkeys. You can
draw a monkey, you can draw anything.
Tyrell smiles. Lets out a laugh.
Lawrence smiles. ' , *
MOMENT '

SONNY kicks his father down the last step.
Pink 5/10/01 40.
SONNY
You lousy piece of shit!
INT. DEN - MORNING
BUCK asleep on the sofa.
HANK backs into den followed by SONNY.
SONNY shoves HANK to the floor.
SONNY puts the GUN to his father's head.
SONNY . !
. How you like that? Huh?
HANK sits still.
BUCK wakes.
SONNY (CONT'D)
Say something.
HANK says nothing.
SONNY kicks his father again.
HANK falls onto his back.
BUCK watches his two boys.
SONNY (CONT'D)
Get the fuck up!
(notices Buck)
Morning Grandpa.
SONNY fires a shot into the ceiling.

HANK
Excuse me?
LETICIA
When you took me and my baby to the
hospital.
MOMENT
HANK
I don't know.
Leticia turns and starts to get out.
Hank speaks up.
HANK (CONT'D)
My son . . . he died . .. I just wanted
to ...
Hank struggles.
HANK (CONT'D)
. . . my son, he's gone"... my son
he was a good man . . . my son . . . he
was my son ...
Hank starts to break.
Rev. Blue 4/30/01
HANK (CONT'D)
... I wasn't a good father .. . he was a
good boy ... a good man ...
Leticia pulls Hank to her.

Hank puts away the rest of Buck's belongings.
Tapes the BOX shut.
209A DEADBOLT 209A

Hank walks in his son's room with his father's box. Puts the
